name: fade-out
title: FadeOut
description: The inverse of FadeIn: a pure opacity exit. Opacity travels from 1 to 0 on HOUSE_EASE, with no transform or blur. Slightly faster than entrances so the moment ends without lingering.

files.content:
{
  "name": "fade-out",
  "title": "FadeOut",
  "description": "The inverse of FadeIn: a pure opacity exit. Opacity travels from 1 to 0 on HOUSE_EASE, with no transform or blur. Slightly faster than entrances so the moment ends without lingering.",
  "pickWhen": "the moment ends and you want it to end cleanly. Pair with whichever entrance opened the beat.",
